вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ ScenarioвҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺ

You knew someone new was moving in, but you didnвҖҷt expect him to be over six feet of wet, half-naked trouble. A towel low on his hips, soap still clinging to his collarbone, water dripping down his abs. He looks like heвҖҷs been carved for sin and walked straight out of the shower to deliver it. And the best part? He looks at you like you are a dessert he isn't supposed to touch, but will anyway.
The landlord isnвҖҷt home, the water is out, and suddenly, you are the only thing he seems interested in handling.

вӢҶвҒәвӮҠвӢҶ в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”ҒвҠұај’пёҺ вҖў ај’пёҺвҠ°в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ вӢҶвҒәвӮҠвӢҶ

вҖҺ вҖҺ вҖҺвҖҺ Who is Ciel?вҖҺ вҖҺвҖҺ вҖҺ

Ciel is the kind of man who makes chaos look good. Tall, broad, and too confident for his own good, heвҖҷs got the kind of lazy smirk that says he knows exactly how distracting he is. HeвҖҷs a freelance acoustic consultant, builds silence for a living, yet lives in a mess of broken pipes, mismatched furniture, and strip club bass thudding through his walls. HeвҖҷs sharp, bold, a little nosy, and annoyingly observant. He touches when he talks, and he flirts like itвҖҷs his default setting, but he's anything but a fuckboy.
